footer.tagline: Norway's first agent-to-agent (A2A) network for local food. We make food producers visible to AI assistants — so customers find you when they ask.
footer.copyright: Rett fra Bonden © {year}. Making food producers visible across Norway.

home.title: Rett fra Bonden — Find local food in Norway
home.description: Search {count} local food producers in Norway. Farms, markets, and farm shops with contact info and opening hours.
home.hero_sub: Search farms, markets and farm shops across Norway. Straight from the farmer to your table.
home.search_placeholder: Search for food, place or producer...
home.ai_assist_hint: Use MCP to let your AI search our database directly.
home.discover_sub: Norwegian food producers in the network
home.how_step1_body: Type what you're looking for — "vegetables in Oslo" or "organic meat".
home.how_step2_body: See products, opening hours, certifications and contact info.
home.how_step3_body: Visit the farm shop, call directly, or let your AI assistant find it automatically.
home.seller_cta_body: Register for free and become visible to thousands of customers — and their AI assistants.
home.ai_sec_title: Use your AI assistant to find local food
home.ai_sec_body: Ask ChatGPT or Claude "where can I find fresh vegetables in Oslo?" — they'll find the answer here. Pick your platform:

search.title: Search local food — Rett fra Bonden
search.description: Search local food producers in Norway. Filter by category, city and certifications.
search.page_sub: Find producers in Norway — by food, city or specialty.
search.no_results_body: We couldn't find any producers matching your search. Try a different word, or explore the categories below.

about.title: About Rett fra Bonden — Local food in Norway
about.description: Rett fra Bonden is Norway's first agent-to-agent network for local food. Read about our mission, how the platform works, and who we are.
about.intro: Rett fra Bonden is a platform that makes Norwegian food producers visible to AI assistants — so customers find you when they ask their AI for local food.
about.mission_body: We want more people to buy food directly from Norwegian farms, markets and local producers. As AI assistants become the main entry point for information, local food must be visible there too.

tech.title: How it works — Rett fra Bonden
tech.description: The technology behind Rett fra Bonden: A2A protocol, MCP server, and how AI assistants find local food.
tech.intro: Rett fra Bonden uses open protocols (A2A and MCP) that let AI assistants find, compare and recommend local food from Norwegian producers — in real time.

privacy.title: Privacy — Rett fra Bonden
privacy.description: Privacy policy for Rett fra Bonden. What we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

city.title: Local food in {city} — Rett fra Bonden
city.description: Find {count} food producers in {city}. Farms, markets and farm shops with contact info and opening hours.

common.translate_note: Description is in Norwegian — we haven't translated producer texts yet.
